text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of dns/p5-Net-DNS-Async,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/130080 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130080

Looks reasonable; approved!  Thanks.
